temporal_description:
The audio is filled with a low, ambient, and suspenseful musical score. A slow, melancholic melody, played on what sounds like a synthesizer or a low string instrument, creates a somber and tense atmosphere. The music is atmospheric and quiet, building a sense of unease and anticipation, as if setting the stage for a serious or dramatic confrontation. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the moody and slightly ominous music to dominate the soundscape.

The camera is positioned behind a man in a blue denim jacket, looking into a dimly lit office. The room has a cool, greenish-blue color palette. In the background, other men are working; one in a plaid shirt is bent over a desk, and another in a dark jacket is also at a desk, his back to the camera. The office is filled with shelves stacked high with files and binders. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner of the screen. The camera remains stationary, creating a sense of observation from within the room.

The view shifts to a high-angle, wide shot of a interrogation room. Three men are seated around a large, dark table. The room is very dark, with most of the light coming from a large window with blinds in the background, casting long shadows across the wooden floor. One man, in a white shirt and tie, sits at the head of the table, looking down at papers. To his right, another man in a blue shirt is also looking down, seemingly at his own documents. A third man, seen from the back, sits opposite them. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is static, providing a full view of the tense, quiet scene.
